headline: Chubb CEO flags threat disrupting global oil supply
summary: When the CEO of the world's largest publicly traded property and casualty insurer describes a waterway as a "war-zone environment" and says conditions change "from day to day, hour to hour," that is not hyperbole. That is a man whose company has skin in the game every time a vessel transits ...

headline: Chubb Limited (CB): One of the Best Financial Stocks to Buy Per Warren Buffett?
summary: We just covered the 10 Best Financial Stocks to Buy According to Warren Buffett and Chubb Limited (NYSE:CB) ranks 3rd on this list. Chubb Limited (NYSE:CB) is a relatively recent addition to the 13F portfolio of Berkshire Hathaway. The fund first declared a stake in the company in the third quarter of 2023. Back then, […]

headline: Oil Declines After US-Iran Peace Talks Show Signs of Progress
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Oil dropped following signs of progress in peace talks between Washington and Tehran, which appeared to get off to a rocky start after US President Donald Trump issued a fresh threat against Iran.Most Read from BloombergIran Says Hormuz Closed Again as Talks With US Set to OpenIranian Negotiators Said to Still Be Engaged in Talks With USUS and Iran Make ‘Progress’ in Talks, Aim to Keep Hormuz OpenDOJ Rejects Judge Request to Certify $1.8 Billion Fund NixedTrump’s Fears About Econo
